Package org.openxava.tab.impl

Interface ITabProvider

All Superinterfaces:
IDataReader, ISearch
All Known Implementing Classes:
JPATabProvider, TabProviderBase
public interface ITabProvider extends ISearch, IDataReader
Provides data and specific behavior from the underlying query technology.

Author:
Javier Paniza
